ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR(AND( ISCHANGED( Is_Payments_Reversed__c ), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payments_Reversed__c ) , "NFS"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payments_Reversed__c ) , "Stopped"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payments_Reversed__c ) , "Unauthorised"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payments_Reversed__c ) , "Stale Dated"))), AND( NOT(ISCHANGED( Is_Payments_Reversed__c )), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payments_Reversed__c ) , "NFS"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payments_Reversed__c ) , "Stopped"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payments_Reversed__c ) , "Unauthorised"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Is_Payments_Reversed__c ) , "Stale Dated")))
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Once the Payment is reversed it cannot be updated
